rules.validIncentive: each actor performs its assigned responsibility
rules.misalignedAction: a known wrong action persists without a Coordinator-added supporting actor
rules.missingSupport: an explicit shared actor assignment with alignment and exit evidence

rules.validIncentive: render the current authorized grammar result
rules.misalignedAction: construct or derive Classical grammar inside rendering
rules.missingSupport: a normalized application request and validated result boundary

rules.validIncentive: remain compatible with the current runtime
rules.misalignedAction: discover required Classical capabilities through optional global checks

rules.validIncentive: carry typed authority instead of surface strings
rules.misalignedAction: invent an undeclared local contract kind

rules.validIncentive: deliver the application through one explicit modern module entry
rules.misalignedAction: reintroduce another browser script lane or implicit ordered global
rules.missingSupport: a capability registered in the canonical ESM installer manifest

rules.misalignedAction: turn the live target into an append-only historical archive
store every reproducible bulk artifact in source control
rules.missingSupport: compact manifests plus external or ignored bulk output
